message:
fix(seance): fix --print flag and clear CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT

Two additional fixes for seance --talk:
1. Use -p (boolean flag) instead of --print for one-shot mode. The prompt
   is a positional arg, not a --print value — --print was swallowing it.
2. Also clear CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT from subprocess env alongside CLAUDECODE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
